history.note: Initial deployment created with template API.
Switched to lightweight scratch image after the original image pull was too slow.
Updated the Sealos deployment with the latest UI and project creation flow changes.
Rolled back after ImagePullBackOff; Sealos registry proxy returned timeout/500 while fetching the new GHCR image.
Updated the live Sealos UI by mounting the latest public/ assets from a ConfigMap after registry-based image rollout failed.
Synced the latest project-list onboarding and compact navigation UI to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap and rollout restart.
Synced the latest infinite-canvas fix and viewport updates to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap replace and rollout restart.

Synced the latest Skills guide, external expand control, and unified database icon updates to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap patch; ingress returned HTTP 200 and remote app.js matched the new frontend code.

Synced the latest chat-side image manager flow, hidden chat avatars, and wider chat panel to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap patch. Remote app.js, styles.css, and homepage HTML matched the updated frontend assets; rollout restart timed out while a replacement pod remained in ContainerCreating, but the live site continued serving the new public assets.

Synced the latest log workspace redesign and chat auto-scroll behavior to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap patch. Remote app.js matched the new realtime/history-exclusive log filters, range selection, and forced chat-bottom scrolling, and the deployment rollout completed successfully.

Synced the latest DevBox config cleanup to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap replace. Removed the DevBox service-domain section and duplicate Metrics/Terminal/version-manager actions from the chat-side config UI; rollout completed successfully.

Synced the latest DevBox IDE-entry card changes and Vibe Coding updates to the live Sealos app via ConfigMap replace. The live app.js matched the new IDE shortcuts, Vibe Coding icon/title, and grouped start/workspace/port config flow; rollout completed successfully.
